title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Fish with Mellow Roasted Vegetables
description: A delicious and healthy fish recipe, featuring pan-seared Norwegian fish served with a medley of mellow roasted vegetables, perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the fish fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer the pan to the preheated oven.
Roast the fish in the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, toss the pre-roasted vegetables with minced garlic and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve the pan-seared fish with the roasted vegetables and garnish with chopped parsley.
